_comment: Simulated output of Copilot running the sre-gap-finder (assess-resiliency) skill in gap-mode. Anchors are verbatim excerpts; the engine locates, stamps source_tier=llm, and re-derives each via the shared signature library. See tests/test_gap_finder.py.

proposals.anchor: return restTemplate.postForObject(baseUrl + "/charge", new Charge(orderId, amountCents), Receipt.class);
proposals.rationale: the payments charge call is behind a circuit breaker but has no timeout; a hung connection stalls the caller
FALSE POSITIVE on purpose: this call already carries @TimeLimiter; the engine must refute it
HALLUCINATED on purpose: no such call exists in the source; the engine must drop it as unlocatable
